headline: Dollar Tree surges on earnings beat and strong guidance
summary: Investing.com -- Dollar Tree Inc. (NASDAQ:DLTR) reported first quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations and raised its full-year earnings outlook, sending shares up 11.2% premarket as investors responded positively to the discount retailer's strong performance and improved profitability.

headline: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations, Stock Jumps 10.4%
summary: Discount treasure-hunt retailer Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $4.98 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $4.85 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.74 per share was 12.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.summary: Discount treasure-hunt retailer Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $4.98 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $4.85 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.74 per share was 12.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: DoorDash and Dollar Tree Partner to Bring Greater Value and Thrill of the Hunt Discovery On-Demand
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 28, 2026--DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH), the local commerce platform, and Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR), one of North America’s largest value retailers, today announced a new partnership to offer on-demand delivery from Dollar Tree’s full U.S. store footprint on DoorDash. headline: Dollar Tree Soars 17%, Dollar General Jumps 5%: Here’s Why Discount Store Stocks Are Catching a Bid
summary: Shares of Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) are up 17% in early trading Thursday, jumping from $95.87 to roughly $112 after the discount retailer posted a sizable Q1 FY2026 beat and raised its full-year profit outlook. Peer Dollar General (NYSE:DG) is riding the sympathy wave, with DG stock up 5% ahead of its own earnings report on ... headline: Dollar Tree Stock Surges After Earnings. The Retailer Has a Big New Delivery Partner.
summary: Earlier Thursday, delivery platform  DoorDash  announced a partnership with  Dollar Tree  to offer on-demand delivery from the retailer’s U.S. stores.  Dollar Tree stock spiked 17%.  Shares had tumbled 22% in 2026—the company’s first calendar year since selling Family Dollar at an enormous loss last summer.

headline: Wall Street pushes to more records as profits keep piling up for US companies
summary: The U.S. stock market is pushing to more records Thursday as companies like Dollar Tree, Snowflake and Hormel Foods keep piling up profits.  Dollar Tree’s stock soared 18.1% after it became the latest to report fatter profit than analysts expected.

content.title: Wall Street pushes to more records as profits keep piling up for US companies
content.summary: The U.S. stock market is pushing to more records Thursday as companies like Dollar Tree, Snowflake and Hormel Foods keep piling up profits.  Dollar Tree’s stock soared 18.1% after it became the latest to report fatter profit than analysts expected.
